main.title: Hello, I am Luiz Renato.
main.subtitle: From the north of Brazil.
main.description:
Law student, militant of the Brazilian Revolutionary Communist Party (PCBR), and perhaps an aspiring developer.
I don't have much to say, but if you want to chat or talk to me, contact me via Telegram or Signal.

donate.title: Support my work
donate.subtitle: Thank you for considering supporting!
donate.description: If you enjoy my work and want to help me keep creating, your donation will be very welcome. Any amount makes a difference.
